commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And if a man shall lie with his uncle's wife, he has uncovered his uncle's nakedness: they shall bear their sin; they shall die childless. The Sadducees read, "they shall die naked. "The present Hebrew has simply, "they shall be without children "their offspring shall be illegitimate. Augustine, q. ) God will not bless their marriage. "Such we know can have no children. Augustine, Apost. ) The guilty shall be slain without delay. (Grotius) (Calmet).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
